description: Set object's direction vector. Up vector will remain unchanged.
examples:
<sqf>
// provided _myMine is local
_myMine setVectorDir [0.3, 1, 0];
_myMine setPosWorld getPosWorld _myMine; // synchronises the mine's direction over the network (special case)
</sqf>
name: setVectorDir
problem_notes: The effect is {{Icon|localeffect|32}} when using [[setVectorDir]] on a mine. Use a position modification to broadcast [[setVectorDir]]'s change (see {{Link|#Example 2}}).
